mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, status, create_time, failed_attempts, lock_time, nick_name, CASE WHEN lock_time IS NOT NULL THEN GREATEST(0, 7200 - TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, lock_time, NOW())) END AS lock_remaining_seconds FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, status, create_time, nick_name) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{nick_name})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET failed_attempts = failed_attempts + 1, lock_time = CASE WHEN lock_time IS NULL AND (failed_attempts + 1) >= #{maxAttempts} THEN NOW() ELSE lock_time END WHERE username = #{username} AND (lock_time IS NULL OR TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, lock_time, NOW()) >= #{lockDurationSeconds})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != '' AND m.status = 1

SELECT id, username, password, nick_name, email, phone, status, create_time, failed_attempts, lock_time FROM sys_user
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{filter.status}
AND lock_time IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, lock_time, NOW()) < 7200
AND (lock_time IS NULL OR TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, lock_time, NOW()) >= 7200)
AND id IN (SELECT user_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE role_id = #{filter.roleId})
ORDER BY
username create_time id
DESC ASC
LIMIT #{filter.offset}, #{filter.size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{filter.status}
AND lock_time IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, lock_time, NOW()) < 7200
AND (lock_time IS NULL OR TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, lock_time, NOW()) >= 7200)
AND id IN (SELECT user_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE role_id = #{filter.roleId})
